Checklists

How creative can you get with your first free checklist?
By Lauren Harper ,  Jeffrey Lerman ,  +2 more
Updated : Jun 16, 2026 10:15am UTC
Last updated on June 16, 2026: We checked for new 99 Nights in the Forest codes!
99 Nights in the Forest is a survival horror experience where the main aim is to rescue four missing children. As the days tick by, you'll need to eat to survive and gather resources to feed yourself and build up a base for protection. At night, you'll be stalked by entities and regularly be attacked by cultists.
Updates often bring new enemies to contend with and new ways to enhance your base. One of the earliest updates that the popular experience launched was the Classes Update. To buy new classes, you need Diamonds, and that's where the 99 Nights in the Forest codes come in handy!
99 Nights in the Forest codes will reward you with free Diamonds, so you can unlock better classes and survive for longer.
Active Codes
How to Redeem
Expired Codes
Code Not Working?
These are the currently working codes for 99 Nights in the Forest:
Code
Reward
15x Diamonds
15x Diamonds
All the codes above have been tested as working at the time of submission. However, codes with unknown expiry dates may stop working at any time. Spotted a new code we haven't included or tried one only to find it's expired? Let us know by reporting them here.
Launch into 99 Nights in the Forest on Roblox
When you're in the lobby, press the Diamond in the bottom left corner
When the Diamond menu opens up, find the blue codes button on the right
Click the copy button on the codes above
Paste the code into the Enter Code bar
Hit submit
Here are the currently expired codes for 99 Nights in the Forest that will no longer work. Since they're expired, you won't be able to get rewards from attempting to redeem them anymore.
Code
Code not working? Here's our advice. Codes for Roblox experiences are usually case-sensitive, so the best way to ensure you've got a working code is to directly copy it from this article. We check all codes before we upload them, so you can guarantee they're working. Just press the copy button and you can then paste the code directly into the redemption bar.
